body.policy_summary: goal=Run safe black-box checks and return verifiable findings only.; constraints=Do not modify code, database, releases, or global settings. Prefer read-only checks and minimal safe interactions. Return evidence-oriented...
command: Run one low-risk black-box probe on the current workflow product. Do not modify code, database, global settings, release state, or delete data. Prefer read-only checks and only use the minimum safe interactions needed to confirm behavior. Prioritize these areas: Training Center loading, Task Center loading, and Requirement & Defects > Defects list/filter/detail. For each confirmed issue, output module, reproduction steps, expected result, actual result, and evidence hints. If no clear issue is confirmed in this pass, state that explicitly.
